description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a hip roof covered in gray shingles and a combination of light green and pale blue exterior walls. The front facade includes a double garage with dark doors, a main entry door, and several windows, all framed by decorative planters and a tiled walkway. A wooden deck extends from one side, providing outdoor living space, while a smaller patio area with a low brick wall is visible at the rear. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes near the main entrance and smaller ones distributed along the sides. The roofline is simple and low-pitched, typical of suburban ranch-style homes. The overall design is functional and modest, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A single-story house with a hip roof, double garage, light-colored walls, and a wooden deck, featuring asymmetrical windows and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a wooden deck, two large windows, a main entry door, and a small patio area with a low wall.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the double garage doors, main entry door, decorative planters, and a tiled walkway leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the expanse of the roof and the blue exterior.
description_view_3: This view shows the back and side of the house, focusing on the roof structure and the wooden deck extending from the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a tiled walkway, flanked by planters, no porch or overhang, and simple trim.
